display.purpose: Prime name and major contextual heading.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Light lift for elevated table zones.

components.name: Sidebar Prime Selector
components.description: Entity selector button used in the left prime list.
components.css: .ds-prime-btn { width: 100%; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.75rem 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--colors-border-subtle); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--colors-surface-default); color: var(--colors-text-default); font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; text-align: left; } .ds-prime-btn:hover { background: var(--colors-interactive-hover); } .ds-prime-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--colors-interactive-accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-prime-avatar { width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--colors-interactive-selected); color: var(--colors-text-default); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-prime-copy { display: grid; min-width: 0; } .ds-prime-name { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--colors-text-strong); text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-prime-address { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--colors-text-muted); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

components.name: TopBar Filter Select
components.description: Main network/protocol filter control in the top bar.
components.css: .ds-filter-wrap { display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; width: 100%; font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-filter-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--colors-text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; } .ds-select { height: 36px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--colors-border-subtle); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--colors-surface-default); color: var(--colors-text-default); padding: 0 40px 0 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-select:hover { border-color: var(--colors-border-default); background: var(--colors-surface-default); } .ds-select:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--colors-interactive-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Allocation grid search control with icon-leading offset and compact vertical rhythm.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; width: 100%; font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-filter-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--colors-text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; } .ds-search { height: 36px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--colors-border-subtle); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--colors-surface-default); color: var(--colors-text-default); padding: 0 12px 0 34px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-search::placeholder { color: var(--colors-text-muted); } .ds-search:hover { border-color: var(--colors-border-default); } .ds-search:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--colors-interactive-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Summary Metric Card
components.description: Primary dashboard metric block used in the 4-up summary rail.
components.html:
Total allocation

$1.2B

26 allocations
components.css: .ds-metric-card { border: 1px solid var(--colors-border-default); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: var(--colors-surface-subtle); padding: 0.875rem; display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-metric-label { margin: 0; color: var(--colors-text-muted); font-size: 12px; line-height: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-metric-value { margin: 0; color: var(--colors-text-strong); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 600; } .ds-metric-detail { margin: 0; color: var(--colors-text-muted); font-size: 12px; line-height: 18px; }

components.name: Data Table Selected Row
components.description: Active table row state with subtle fill and inset outline.
components.css: .ds-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; min-height: 64px; padding: 0 0.75rem; background: var(--colors-interactive-selected); color: var(--colors-text-default); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--colors-border-default); border-radius: 0; font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-row-asset { color: var(--colors-text-strong); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-row-balance { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--colors-text-default); } .ds-row-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--colors-text-muted); }

components.name: Segmented Risk Tabs
components.description: Bottom-panel tabset for risk, required capital, and activity views.
components.css: .ds-segmented { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--colors-border-subtle); background: var(--colors-surface-subtle); font-family: IBM Plex Sans, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-seg-item { min-height: 28px; padding: 0 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: transparent; color: var(--colors-text-muted); font-size: 12px; line-height: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; font-weight: 600; } .ds-seg-item:hover { background: var(--colors-interactive-hover); } .ds-seg-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--colors-interactive-accent); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-seg-item-active { background: var(--colors-surface-default); border-color: var(--colors-border-default); color: var(--colors-text-strong); }

narrative.overview:
STL Verify should feel like an operations desk built for sustained concentration, not a presentation layer. Information density is high, but the layout keeps scanning friction low by using stable structure, restrained color, and predictable interaction zones.

The visual system favors practical rhythm over decorative flourish. High-value metrics, filters, and tables are separated through spacing cadence and tonal layers, while interaction states stay quiet until users need to act. The interface rejects ornamental gradients, novelty controls, and high-chroma noise that competes with risk signals.
keyCharacteristics: Dense by design, readable at a glance.
Neutral-first surfaces with one operational accent.
Structured spacing rhythm from compact controls to roomy section breaks.
Familiar controls and table affordances over experimental patterns.

rules.name: The Signal Budget Rule
rules.body: Accent blue is used only when an element is actionable, selected, or needs immediate operator attention.

rules.name: The Operator Scan Rule
rules.body: For data-heavy zones, keep body copy in the 0.75rem to 0.875rem range and reserve larger type for wayfinding anchors only.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Base states stay flat, elevation appears only to clarify layering or active context.

dos: Do keep operational accent usage intentional, primary actions and active states only.
Do preserve consistent control heights around 2.25rem across selects and inputs.
Do use spacing rhythm to separate groups, tight inside controls and generous between sections.
Do keep table readability primary, metadata muted but legible.
donts: Don't introduce decorative gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism overlays.
Don't use side-stripe border accents on cards, list rows, or callouts.
Don't apply large-display typography to control labels or dense data regions.
Don't replace familiar table and filter affordances with novelty interactions.
